deliverable: Screenshot search & review console for designers and PMs

data_contract.record_schema: §7 canonical record — persisted as ScreenshotClassification + ClassificationLabel rows (prisma/schema.prisma)
data_contract.records_source: classification store (Prisma / Neon) via new /api/classifications* routes

prisma_models.ClassificationLabel: classification_labels — one row per (classification, axis, label); faceting join
prisma_models.TaxonomyGapLog: taxonomy_gap_log — out-of-scope proposals for PM review

backend_routes: GET /api/classifications (faceted search, secondaries matched, per-axis AND/OR)
GET /api/classifications/facets (live counts for active filter set)
GET /api/classifications/pattern (cross-app pivot on one Axis-B or Axis-A slug)
GET /api/classifications/export (CSV + image zip of filtered set)
ui_pages: /screens (gallery + faceted filter rail + live counts + export)
ui_requirements: Gallery grid of thumbnails as default view; lazy-loaded.
Faceted filtering: multi-select within a facet, AND across facets, per-facet AND/OR toggle. Matching MUST include secondary labels.
Full-text search over source_app, salient_text, rationale, and label display names.
Detail view: full image + all tags both axes (primary vs secondary, confidence), source app, platform, model+tier, taxonomy_version, timestamp.
Cross-app pattern view (pivot on Axis-B type and on Axis-A slug).
Coverage matrix: Axis-A screens x source_app.
Review queue: needs_review == true with review_reason.
Human-in-the-loop correction written back as authoritative LabelOverride the classifier respects and never overwrites.
acceptance_criteria: Every §7 field is filterable or visible somewhere in the UI.
Multi-label screens appear under ALL their labels' filters, on both axes.
A corrected label survives re-classification and taxonomy-version bumps.

conventions.images: Screenshot.s3Url is an S3 key; resolve via getPresignedScreenshotUrl/getScreenshotUrl in src/lib/s3.ts
conventions.design: invoke the design-system skill (StableX Product Terminali) before styling
conventions.scope: always filter to TAXONOMY_VERSION from src/lib/taxonomy.ts; never read the void Screenshot.aiClassification
